---
title: "03 - GARCH Volatility Modeling"
subtitle: ECON 612 Time Series Project
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "rugarch", "tseries", "FinTS", "ggplot2", "lubridate")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}

df       <- read_csv("../data/clean/monthly_panel.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
fx_daily <- read_csv("../data/clean/daily_fx.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# 策略说明

> GARCH 在高频数据上效果更好。策略：
>
> 1. 在**日度数据**上拟合 ARIMA-GARCH
> 2. 提取日度条件方差 σ²ₜ
> 3. 聚合为**月度均值**，作为 VAR 的"波动率"变量

---

# Part A: 日度 GARCH（主要模型）

## A1. 准备日度对数收益率

```{r daily-returns, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
fx_daily <- fx_daily %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(log_ret = c(NA, diff(log_fx))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(log_ret))

cat("日度收益率:", nrow(fx_daily), "条\n")

ggplot(fx_daily, aes(x = date, y = log_ret)) +
  geom_line(color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "EUR/CNY Daily Log Returns",
       x = NULL, y = "Log Return") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## A2. ARCH 效应检验

```{r arch-test-daily}
cat("=== ARCH-LM Test (lag=5) ===\n")
print(ArchTest(fx_daily$log_ret, lags = 5))

cat("\n=== ARCH-LM Test (lag=10) ===\n")
print(ArchTest(fx_daily$log_ret, lags = 10))
```

## A3. GARCH(1,1) 拟合

```{r garch-fit}
spec <- ugarchspec(
  variance.model = list(
    model      = "sGARCH",
    garchOrder = c(1, 1)
  ),
  mean.model = list(
    armaOrder    = c(1, 1),
    include.mean = TRUE
  ),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)

fit_garch <- ugarchfit(spec = spec, data = fx_daily$log_ret)
fit_garch
```

## A4. GARCH 模型诊断

```{r garch-diag}
# 系数
cat("=== GARCH Coefficients ===\n")
print(coef(fit_garch))

# 波动持续性
alpha <- coef(fit_garch)["alpha1"]
beta  <- coef(fit_garch)["beta1"]
cat("\nalpha + beta =", alpha + beta, "\n")
cat("→ 越接近1，波动冲击持续性越强\n")
```

```{r garch-plots, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# 标准化残差 ACF
plot(fit_garch, which = 8)
```

```{r garch-plots2, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# 标准化残差平方 ACF
plot(fit_garch, which = 9)
```

```{r garch-qq, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# QQ Plot
plot(fit_garch, which = 10)
```

```{r news-impact, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# News Impact Curve
plot(fit_garch, which = 11)
```

## A5. 提取条件方差 & 聚合为月度

```{r extract-sigma, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
fx_daily$cond_var <- as.numeric(sigma(fit_garch))^2

vol_monthly <- fx_daily %>%
  mutate(ym = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(ym) %>%
  summarise(
    garch_vol = mean(cond_var, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(date = ym)

ggplot(vol_monthly, aes(x = date, y = garch_vol)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkorange") +
  labs(title = "GARCH(1,1) Monthly Conditional Variance",
       subtitle = "Aggregated from daily estimates",
       x = NULL, y = expression(sigma^2)) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# Part B: 月度 ARCH 效应检验（补充）

```{r arch-test-monthly}
arima_resid <- read_csv("../data/clean/arima_residuals_monthly.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

cat("=== Monthly ARCH-LM Test (lag=3) ===\n")
print(ArchTest(arima_resid$resid, lags = 3))

cat("\n=== Monthly ARCH-LM Test (lag=6) ===\n")
print(ArchTest(arima_resid$resid, lags = 6))
```

---

# Part C: 模型比较（可选）

```{r model-compare}
# EGARCH: 捕捉非对称效应
spec_e <- ugarchspec(
  variance.model = list(model = "eGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  mean.model     = list(armaOrder = c(1, 1), include.mean = TRUE),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)
fit_e <- ugarchfit(spec_e, data = fx_daily$log_ret)

# GJR-GARCH
spec_gjr <- ugarchspec(
  variance.model = list(model = "gjrGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  mean.model     = list(armaOrder = c(1, 1), include.mean = TRUE),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)
fit_gjr <- ugarchfit(spec_gjr, data = fx_daily$log_ret)

# 比较
model_comparison <- tibble(
  Model = c("sGARCH(1,1)", "eGARCH(1,1)", "gjrGARCH(1,1)"),
  AIC   = c(infocriteria(fit_garch)[1],
            infocriteria(fit_e)[1],
            infocriteria(fit_gjr)[1]),
  BIC   = c(infocriteria(fit_garch)[2],
            infocriteria(fit_e)[2],
            infocriteria(fit_gjr)[2])
)
print(model_comparison)
```

# 保存波动率数据

```{r save}
df_final <- df %>%
  left_join(vol_monthly, by = "date")

write_csv(df_final, "../data/clean/monthly_panel_with_vol.csv")
cat("带 GARCH 波动率的月度面板已保存\n")
cat("有波动率数据的观测数:", sum(!is.na(df_final$garch_vol)), "\n")
```

# 小结

> **在这里记录：**
>
> - ARCH-LM 检验结果：是否存在 ARCH 效应？
> - GARCH(1,1) 的 α 和 β 值？α+β 接近 1 吗？
> - 标准化残差是否干净？
> - 波动率高的时期对应什么事件？
> - 三个 GARCH 变体哪个最好？
